capability.name: profile_show
capability.command: bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh mode profile show >/dev/null

capability.name: compressed_check_default_full
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; cp README.md prd.md CLAUDE.md "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Compressed check full' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check >/dev/null)

capability.name: compressed_init_deepen_semantics
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Compressed deepen' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init deepen >/dev/null && grep -q 'deepen: idea=' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/mvp-skeleton.md && test -f .rpi-outfile/state/init_summary.json)

capability.name: compressed_spec_expand_semantics
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Compressed expand' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh spec expand "确认方向B，Must链路L1,L2,L3，Won't链路L4，加权覆盖率目标85%" >/dev/null && grep -q '选择方向：B' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md && grep -q '覆盖率目标：P0 >= 80%' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md && grep -q '加权覆盖率目标：85%' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md && grep -q 'M0 Must（1-3）：L1, L2, L3' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md)

capability.name: harness_toggle_bundle
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Harness toggle bundle' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh mode harness off >/dev/null && jq -e '.harness_enabled == false and .architecture_enforce == false and .spec_link_enforce == false and .gates_auto_retry_enabled == false' .claude/workflow/config/runtime.json >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh mode harness on >/dev/null && jq -e '.harness_enabled == true and .architecture_enforce == true and .spec_link_enforce == true and .gates_auto_retry_enabled == true' .claude/workflow/config/runtime.json >/dev/null)

capability.name: bootstrap_full_seed
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap "Bootstrap 验证项目" "Web" >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check artifact --json | jq -e '.applyReady == true and (.artifacts[] | select(.id=="epic") | .status == "done") and (.artifacts[] | select(.id=="milestones") | .status == "done")' >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh gates run M0 >/dev/null)

capability.name: gates_auto_retry_smoke
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Gate retry smoke' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh gates run M0 >/dev/null && jq -s 'map(select(.event=="quality_gate_auto")) | length >= 1' .rpi-outfile/logs/events.jsonl >/dev/null)

capability.name: bootstrap_force_overwrite
capability.command:
tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap "Force 覆盖验证" "Web" >/dev/null && mkdir -p .rpi-outfile/specs/l0 && printf '# L0 Spec

## 架构边界
- Out of Scope：
  - 占位
' > .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/spec.md && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap --force "Force 覆盖验证" "Web" >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check contract --quiet && grep -q '## 数据模型' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/spec.md && grep -q 'Force 覆盖验证' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md)

capability.name: spec_state_pipeline
capability.command: bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh spec build --quiet && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh spec verify --scope all --quiet

capability.name: spec_link_graph
capability.command: bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh spec link --quiet

capability.name: check_ux_command_smoke
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'UX check smoke' Web >/dev/null && cp .rpi-blueprint/specs/l0/ux-spec.template.md .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/ux-spec.md && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check ux --quiet)

capability.name: check_linkage_command_smoke
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Linkage check smoke' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check skeleton-init --frontend >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check linkage --quiet)

capability.name: check_skeleton_command_smoke
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Skeleton check smoke' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check skeleton-init --frontend >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check skeleton --quiet)

capability.name: architecture_rules_check
capability.command: bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check architecture --require-rules --quiet

capability.name: risk_profile_arg_override
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Risk profile arg override' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh mode harness on >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check risk --tool Bash --value 'terraform apply -auto-approve' --profile dev --json | jq -e '.profile == "dev" and .profile_source == "arg" and .decision == "allow"' >/dev/null)

capability.name: risk_profile_selector_command
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Risk profile selector command' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh mode harness on >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check risk --tool Bash --value 'terraform apply -auto-approve' --json | jq -e '.profile == "prod" and (.profile_source | startswith("command:")) and .decision == "ask"' >/dev/null)

capability.name: risk_profile_runtime_override
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Risk profile runtime override' Web >/dev/null && jq '.risk_profile_override = "staging"' .claude/workflow/config/runtime.json > .claude/workflow/config/runtime.json.tmp && mv .claude/workflow/config/runtime.json.tmp .claude/workflow/config/runtime.json && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check risk --tool Bash --value 'echo hello' --json | jq -e '.profile == "staging" and .profile_source == "runtime" and .decision == "allow"' >/dev/null)

capability.name: anti_entropy_strict
capability.command: bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh auto entropy --strict >/dev/null

capability.name: agent_memory_update_smoke
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Agent memory update smoke' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh auto memory --task TASK-EVAL --result fail --root-cause spec_missing --note 'eval memory' --force >/dev/null && test -f AGENTS.md && grep -q '## Learned Guards' AGENTS.md && grep -q 'task_id: TASK-EVAL' AGENTS.md)

capability.name: audit_pack_export
capability.command: bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh observe audit-pack --task TASK-EVAL >/dev/null

capability.name: audit_report_json_smoke
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Audit report smoke' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh observe audit-report --days 7 --json | jq -e '.generated_at != null and .task_metrics.tasks_total >= 0 and .gate_metrics.gate_failures_total >= 0' >/dev/null)

capability.name: a2a_review_json_smoke
capability.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && git init >/dev/null && git config user.email eval@example.com && git config user.name eval-bot && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'A2A smoke' Web >/dev/null && git add -A && git commit -m init >/dev/null && printf '\n<!-- eval -->\n' >> .claude/workflow/config/runtime.example.md && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh auto review --json | jq -e '.approved == true and .non_core_change == true and (.checks | length) >= 4' >/dev/null)

regression.name: pre_tool_use_core_engine_smoke
regression.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && PYBIN=$(command -v python3 || command -v python) && test -n "$PYBIN" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'PreToolUse smoke' Web >/dev/null && printf '{"tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"src/app.ts"}}' | "$PYBIN" .claude/workflow/engine/pre_tool_use_core.py --project-dir "$tmp" | jq -e '.hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision == "deny"' >/dev/null && test -z "$(printf '{"tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"python --version"}}' | "$PYBIN" .claude/workflow/engine/pre_tool_use_core.py --project-dir "$tmp")")

regression.name: session_start_schema_safe
regression.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && PYBIN=$(command -v python3 || command -v python) && test -n "$PYBIN" && printf '{}' | "$PYBIN" .claude/workflow/engine/session_start_core.py --project-dir "$tmp" | jq -e '.systemMessage != null and (.hookSpecificOutput | not)' >/dev/null)

regression.name: stop_hook_schema_safe
regression.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && PYBIN=$(command -v python3 || command -v python) && test -n "$PYBIN" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Stop schema smoke' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh task start 001 >/dev/null && printf '{}' | "$PYBIN" .claude/workflow/engine/stop_gate_core.py --project-dir "$tmp" | jq -e '.decision == "block" and .reason != null and (.hookSpecificOutput | not)' >/dev/null)

regression.name: post_tool_use_autonomy_counter
regression.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && PYBIN=$(command -v python3 || command -v python) && test -n "$PYBIN" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Autonomy counter smoke' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh task start 001 >/dev/null && printf '{"tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"src/app.ts"}}' | "$PYBIN" .claude/workflow/engine/post_tool_use_core.py --project-dir "$tmp" >/dev/null && jq -e '.autonomy.tool_event_count >= 1 and .autonomy.last_tool_event_at != ""' .rpi-outfile/state/current_task.json >/dev/null)

regression.name: core_checks_smoke
regression.command: bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check discovery --quiet && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check scope --quiet && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check architecture --quiet

regression.name: architecture_scan_limit_runtime
regression.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Architecture scan limit runtime' Web >/dev/null && jq '.architecture_scan_max_files = 1 | .architecture_scan_exclude_dirs = [".git", "node_modules"]' .claude/workflow/config/runtime.json > .claude/workflow/config/runtime.json.tmp && mv .claude/workflow/config/runtime.json.tmp .claude/workflow/config/runtime.json && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check architecture --quiet)

regression.name: mvp_override_waiver_pass
regression.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Override waiver pass' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh mode profile apply strict-regulated >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap --force 'Override waiver pass' Web >/dev/null && sed -i.bak 's/^- 选择方向：.*/- 选择方向：B（核心可用级）/' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md && sed -i.bak 's/^- 覆盖率目标：.*/- 覆盖率目标：P0 >= 75%/' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md && sed -i.bak 's/^- 加权覆盖率目标：.*/- 加权覆盖率目标：80%/' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md && rm -f .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md.bak && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check discovery --quiet)

regression.name: mvp_override_missing_demote_fails
regression.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap 'Override enforce fail' Web >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh mode profile apply strict-regulated >/dev/null && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap --force 'Override enforce fail' Web >/dev/null && sed -i.bak 's/^- 选择方向：.*/- 选择方向：B（核心可用级）/' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md && sed -i.bak 's/^- 覆盖率目标：.*/- 覆盖率目标：P0 >= 75%/' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md && sed -i.bak 's/^- 加权覆盖率目标：.*/- 加权覆盖率目标：80%/' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md && sed -i.bak '/^  - 降权 /d' .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md && rm -f .rpi-outfile/specs/l0/discovery.md.bak && ! bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh check discovery --quiet)

regression.name: metadata_fields_removed
regression.command: ! rg -n "最后更新|维护者|Maintainer|Last Updated|Updated on" .rpi-blueprint/specs .claude/skills >/dev/null

regression.name: primary_check_cwd_independent
regression.command: tmp=$(mktemp -d); cp -r .claude "$tmp"/; cp -r .rpi-blueprint "$tmp"/; (cd "$tmp" && bash .claude/workflow/rpi.sh init bootstrap "Gate path eval" Web >/dev/null && cd .claude && bash workflow/rpi.sh check bootstrap >/dev/null)
